json_proto.name: imf_economic_outlook

queries.sqlText: SELECT c.COUNTRY_NAME, i.YEAR, i.VALUE FROM API_DEMO.PUBLIC.IMF_DATAMAPPER_INDICATORS i JOIN API_DEMO.PUBLIC.COUNTRY_METADATA c ON i.COUNTRY_CODE = c.COUNTRY_CODE WHERE c.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' AND i.INDICATOR = 'NGDP_RPCH' AND i.YEAR BETWEEN 2024 AND 2030 ORDER BY i.YEAR
queries.correspondingQuestion: What is India's GDP growth forecast from 2024 to 2030?

queries.sqlText: SELECT c.COUNTRY_NAME, i.YEAR, i.VALUE FROM API_DEMO.PUBLIC.IMF_DATAMAPPER_INDICATORS i JOIN API_DEMO.PUBLIC.COUNTRY_METADATA c ON i.COUNTRY_CODE = c.COUNTRY_CODE JOIN API_DEMO.PUBLIC.INDICATOR_METADATA m ON i.INDICATOR = m.INDICATOR WHERE c.REGION = 'Europe' AND i.INDICATOR = 'LUR' AND i.YEAR = 2024 ORDER BY i.VALUE DESC
queries.correspondingQuestion: Compare unemployment rates across European countries in 2024

queries.sqlText: SELECT c.COUNTRY_NAME, i.YEAR, i.VALUE FROM API_DEMO.PUBLIC.IMF_DATAMAPPER_INDICATORS i JOIN API_DEMO.PUBLIC.COUNTRY_METADATA c ON i.COUNTRY_CODE = c.COUNTRY_CODE WHERE c.IS_G7 = TRUE AND i.INDICATOR = 'PCPIPCH' AND i.YEAR BETWEEN 2024 AND 2030 ORDER BY c.COUNTRY_NAME, i.YEAR
queries.correspondingQuestion: What are the inflation projections for G7 countries from 2024 to 2030?

queries.sqlText: SELECT c.COUNTRY_NAME, i.VALUE FROM API_DEMO.PUBLIC.IMF_DATAMAPPER_INDICATORS i JOIN API_DEMO.PUBLIC.COUNTRY_METADATA c ON i.COUNTRY_CODE = c.COUNTRY_CODE WHERE i.INDICATOR = 'NGDPD' AND i.YEAR = 2025 ORDER BY i.VALUE DESC LIMIT 10
queries.correspondingQuestion: What are the top 10 economies by nominal GDP in 2025?

queries.sqlText: SELECT c.REGION, AVG(i.VALUE) AS avg_gdp_growth FROM API_DEMO.PUBLIC.IMF_DATAMAPPER_INDICATORS i JOIN API_DEMO.PUBLIC.COUNTRY_METADATA c ON i.COUNTRY_CODE = c.COUNTRY_CODE WHERE i.INDICATOR = 'NGDP_RPCH' AND i.YEAR = 2025 GROUP BY c.REGION ORDER BY avg_gdp_growth DESC
queries.correspondingQuestion: What is the average GDP growth by region in 2025?

queries.sqlText: SELECT c.COUNTRY_NAME, MAX(CASE WHEN i.INDICATOR = 'NGDP_RPCH' THEN i.VALUE END) AS gdp_growth, MAX(CASE WHEN i.INDICATOR = 'PCPIPCH' THEN i.VALUE END) AS inflation, MAX(CASE WHEN i.INDICATOR = 'LUR' THEN i.VALUE END) AS unemployment FROM API_DEMO.PUBLIC.IMF_DATAMAPPER_INDICATORS i JOIN API_DEMO.PUBLIC.COUNTRY_METADATA c ON i.COUNTRY_CODE = c.COUNTRY_CODE WHERE c.IS_G20 = TRUE AND i.YEAR = 2025 AND i.INDICATOR IN ('NGDP_RPCH', 'PCPIPCH', 'LUR') GROUP BY c.COUNTRY_NAME ORDER BY gdp_growth DESC
queries.correspondingQuestion: Show GDP growth, inflation, and unemployment for all G20 countries in 2025

json_proto.semanticDescription: IMF World Economic Outlook data covering 15 macroeconomic indicators (GDP, inflation, unemployment, government debt, current account, population, PPP) for 60 countries from 1980-2030. Enables analysis by country, region, income group, and economic groupings (G7, G20, emerging markets). Supports forecasting questions, cross-country comparisons, and trend analysis.
